name: Tofu with Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve brown sugar in tamari and set aside.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
3. Stir fry minced ginger and garlic for 1 minute.
4. Add tofu and water to the wok and cook for 2 minutes.
5. Mix in the tamari mixture and cook for 1 minute.
6. Add broccoli and cook until tender-crisp.
7. Mix in chopped scallions and serve hot over rice.
